title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Air India Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Air India Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
